---
title: "GenerateModelFigures"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-01"
---

```{r}

# TODO: add comments

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(purrr)
library(rmarkdown)
library(stringr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)
library(tidyverse)

```

```{r}

cities <- c("CHIL")
species_list <- c("Coyote", "Squirrel-Chipmunk", "Gray squirrel")
thresholds <- c(0.5, 0.8, 0.99)

filepath <- "../"

```

```{r}

estimates <- data.frame(
  city <- character(),
  species <- character(),
  threshold <- numeric(),
  estimate <- numeric(),
  lower <- numeric(),
  upper <- numeric(),
  Impervious <- integer(),
  Treatment <- character()
)

for (city in cities) {
  for (species in species_list) {
    for (confidence in thresholds) {
      # render(paste0(filepath, "R Files/Occupancy Modeling.Rmd"),
      #        params = list(path = filepath, sp_name = species, range = "All",
      #                      by = "Week", city = "PACA", conf = confidence))
      
      cur_df <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "Output/", city, "/Conf. ", confidence, "/Results - ", species, "/", species, "_m2_md_Predictions.csv"))
      
      cur_df["city"] <- city
      cur_df["species"] <- species
      cur_df["threshold"] <- confidence
      
      estimates <- rbind(estimates, cur_df)
    }
    
    human_df <- read.csv(paste0(filepath, "Output/", city, "/Conf. 0.99/Results - ", species, "/", species, "_m2_human_Predictions.csv"))
    
    human_df["city"] <- city
    human_df["species"] <- species
    human_df["threshold"] <- 0
    
    estimates <- rbind(estimates, human_df)
  }
}

```

```{r}

output_path <- paste0(filepath, "Output/")

for (location in cities) {
  for (name in species_list) {
    species_estimates <- estimates %>%
      filter(species == name, city == location)
    
    species_estimates <- species_estimates %>%
      mutate(threshold = as.factor(threshold)) %>%
      arrange(threshold, Impervious)
    
    ggplot()+
      geom_line(data=species_estimates, 
                  aes(x=Impervious, y=estimate, color=threshold, group=threshold))+
      geom_ribbon(data=species_estimates,
                  aes(x=Impervious, ymin=lower,ymax=upper, fill=threshold, group=threshold), alpha=0.25)+
      scale_color_manual(values=c("dodgerblue", "firebrick", "red", "mistyrose"))+
      scale_fill_manual(values=c("dodgerblue", "firebrick", "red", "mistyrose"))+
      theme_bw()+
      ylab("Occupancy")+
      xlab("Impervious Cover (%)")+
      ggtitle(name)+
      ylim(0,1)
    
    ggsave(paste0(output_path, location, "/", name, "_estimates.jpg"), units="in", height=4, width=5, dpi=600)
  }
}

```

```{r}

cities <- c("PACA", "CHIL")
output_path <- "../Output/"

for (city in cities) {
  city_output <- paste0(output_path, city, "/")
  if (dir.exists(city_output) == F) {
    next
  }
  
  model_path <- paste0(city_output, "best_model.csv")
  if (file.exists(model_path) == F) {
    next
  }
  
  model_file <- read.csv(model_path)
  
  complete_species <- model_file %>%
    group_by(Species) #%>%
    # filter(n_distinct(Threshold) == 11) %>%
    # ungroup()
  
  ggplot(complete_species, aes(x = Threshold, y = Species, fill = model)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("m1" = "#1b9e77", "m2" = "#d95f02")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      x = "Threshold",
      y = "Species",
      fill = "Best Model",
      title = "Model Performance Across Thresholds"
    )
  
  ggsave(paste0(city_output, "best_model.jpg"))
  
  results_file <- read.csv(paste0(city_output, "model_results.csv"))
  
  m2_results <- results_file %>%
    filter(model == "m2") #%>%
    # group_by(Species) %>%
    # filter(n_distinct(Threshold) == 11) %>%
    # ungroup()
  
  # ggplot(m2_results, aes(x = Threshold, y = AICwt, color = Species)) +
  #   geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  #   geom_line() +
  #   coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  #   theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  #   labs(
  #     x = "Threshold",
  #     y = "AIC Weight for Model 2",
  #     color = "Species",
  #     title = "Support for Model 2 Across Thresholds by Species"
  #   )
  
  # ggplot(m2_results, aes(x = Threshold, y = AICwt)) +
  #   geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = "#1b9e77") +
  #   geom_line(color = "#1b9e77") +
  #   coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  #   facet_wrap(~ Species) +
  #   theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  #   labs(
  #     x = "Threshold",
  #     y = "AIC Weight for Model 2",
  #     title = "Model 2 Support Across Thresholds by Species"
  #   )
  
  m2_results %>%
    mutate(color_group = ifelse(AICwt > 0.5, "AICwt > 0.5", "AICwt ≤ 0.5")) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = Threshold, y = AICwt)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = color_group), size = 2, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_line(aes(group = Species), color = "gray70", alpha = 0.6) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("AICwt > 0.5" = "#d95f02", "AICwt ≤ 0.5" = "#1b9e77")) +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    facet_wrap(~ Species) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(
      x = "Threshold",
      y = "AIC Weight for Model 2",
      color = "Model 2 Support",
      title = "Model 2 AIC Weight Across Thresholds by Species"
    )
  
  ggsave(paste0(city_output, "m2_support.jpg"))
}

```
